stand.headline: Scan your receipt
stand.explainer: Open your camera, point it at the code — and the receipt is on your phone.
stand.noApp: No app. No email. No paper.
stand.printHint: Print on A4, fold or place in a holder at the counter.

claim.noReceiptBody: No receipt has been issued at {merchant} in the last 15 minutes. Please ask the staff.

landing.heroSub: Customers scan and have their receipt instantly. No app, no email, no paper.
landing.tap1: You ring up the sale as usual
landing.tap2: The customer scans at the counter
landing.review1: One tap to leave a review
landing.review2: Right at the moment of purchase
landing.loyalty1: A loyalty card they'll never lose
landing.vat1: VAT per rate on every receipt
landing.brand1: Add your logo, links and branding
landing.brand3: Keep your brand top of mind
landing.newWayBody: One tile at the counter replaces all of it. And the paper.
landing.orderBody1: On the annual plan the tile is free: DKK 1,990 for your first year, everything included.
landing.orderBody2: Not for you? Stop the pilot at any time — no strings attached.
landing.priceStartNote: Starts once your tile is live. Pilot period included.
landing.businessesTitle: Works for every type of business
landing.businessesSub: If you take payments and print receipts, Tapbon works for you.
landing.biz1Body: Speed up service and delight your guests.
landing.biz2Body: Boost loyalty and turn receipts into repeat sales.
landing.biz3Body: Professional receipts and return visits via the loyalty card.
landing.biz5Body: Keep customers informed and coming back.
landing.biz6Body: Simple, secure receipts for every visit.
landing.missionP1: Every year, an estimated 300 billion paper receipts are printed around the world.
landing.missionP2: A third of which gets scrunched up and binned on the spot. The rest? It often ends up in landfill.
landing.missionP3: It's a strange thing to keep doing. A material that costs money to buy, costs money to maintain, and does more harm than good.
landing.missionP4: Tapbon is here to change that.
landing.missionBold: No paper. No printer. No bin. Just a better way to issue receipts — for your business, your customers, and the planet.
landing.faqTitle: Everything you need to know before getting started.
landing.faq1Q: Will this work with my POS system?
landing.faq1A: Yes. Tapbon runs alongside your POS and requires no integration. You enter the sale in Tapbon in seconds.
landing.faq2Q: Do my customers need to download anything?
landing.faq2A: No. The receipt opens directly in the phone's browser. No login, no app, no email.
landing.faq3A: Around ten minutes. Create your business, place the tile by the register, and you're ready to issue receipts.
landing.faq4Q: Are the receipts valid for tax records and VAT?
landing.faq4A: Every receipt shows VAT per rate and the CVR number, and is digitally sealed at issue so it can't be altered afterwards.
landing.faq5A: DKK 499 for the tile and DKK 199 per month — or DKK 1,990 per year with the tile included. The pilot period is free.
landing.faq6A: Everything is hosted in the EU (Sweden). No trackers on the receipt page, and customer data is stored only with consent. GDPR from day one.
landing.faq7A: Yes. No lock-in, and the pilot period is free until it works for you.
landing.faq8A: Email and phone support in Danish and English, plus guided setup for your first tile.
landing.footerTagline: The smart tile that replaces paper receipt printers. Danish owned.
landing.footerDisclaimer: Tapbon is an independent product and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by any POS provider. Brand names are used only to describe compatibility with those systems.
